description_long: This electric drill features a robust, industrial design with a blue cylindrical body and a metallic silver front housing. The handle is ergonomically shaped and wrapped with an orange power cord that terminates in a two-prong plug, indicating it is powered by electricity. The front section includes a black, textured chuck for holding drill bits, and a visible adjustment ring. Ventilation slots are present on the blue casing to prevent overheating during use. A black trigger button is located on the handle for operation, and a small switch or button is visible on the top of the body. The drill shows signs of wear, with scuffs and marks on the blue paint, suggesting frequent use in a workshop or construction environment.
description: A blue and silver electric drill with an orange power cord, black chuck, and visible trigger button, showing signs of wear and heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular metallic chuck, the end of the power cord, and the symmetrical blue body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue body, orange power cord wrapped around the handle, black trigger button, and metallic chuck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded blue casing, ventilation slot, and the handle extending downward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue body, orange power cord, black trigger button, and metallic chuck, similar to the left but with different wear patterns.
